meaning: n.(软体动物介壳的) 角质层
examples: Hair furcation because the surface layer (or periostracum) of hair stem has been already damaged.
When the hair periostracum starts breakage, internal at the time that fiber exposed, the hair would become dry.
Treating the sample of periostracum cicada with suspension technique, calcium, manganese and zinc were successfully determined by FAAS.
